From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Not to be confused with [Social movement theory](/wiki/Social_movement_theory "Social movement theory").

Academic journal

*Social Movement Studies*

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Discipline | [Sociology](/wiki/Sociology "Sociology"), [political science](/wiki/Political_science "Political science"), [anthropology](/wiki/Anthropology "Anthropology") |
| Language | English |
| Edited by | Cristina Flesher Fominaya |
| Publication details | |

| Publisher | [Routledge](/wiki/Routledge "Routledge") |
| Frequency | Bimonthly |
| [Impact factor](/wiki/Impact_factor "Impact factor") | 2.748 (2021) |
| Standard abbreviations [ISO 4](https://marcinwrochna.github.io/abbrevIso/?search=Social_Movement_Studies) ([alt](http://www.issn.org/services/online-services/access-to-the-ltwa/)) **·** [Bluebook](/wiki/Wikipedia:WikiProject_Academic_Journals/Bluebook_journals "Wikipedia:WikiProject Academic Journals/Bluebook journals") ([alt](https://westerncriminology.org/publications/bluebook-abbreviations/)) [NLM](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/nlmcatalog?term=1474-2837%5BISSN%5D) ([alt](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/nlmcatalog?term=Social+Movement+Studies%5BJournal%5D)) **·** [MathSciNet](https://mathscinet.ams.org/msnhtml/serials.pdf) ([alt](https://mathscinet.ams.org/mathscinet/search/journals.html?journalName=1474-2837&Submit=Search) Paid subscription required) | |
| [ISO 4](/wiki/ISO_4_(infobox) "ISO 4 (infobox)") | *Soc. Mov. Stud.* |

| [ISSN](/wiki/ISSN_(identifier) "ISSN (identifier)") | [1474-2837](https://www.worldcat.org/search?fq=x0:jrnl&q=n2:1474-2837) (print) [1474-2829](https://www.worldcat.org/search?fq=x0:jrnl&q=n2:1474-2829) (web) |
| [OCLC](/wiki/OCLC_(identifier) "OCLC (identifier)") no. | [50327191](https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/50327191) |
| Links | |
| * [Journal homepage](https://www.tandfonline.com/action/journalInformation?show=aimsScope&journalCode=csms20) * [Online access](http://www.tandfonline.com/toc/csms20/current) * [Online archive](http://www.tandfonline.com/loi/csms20) | |

***Social Movement Studies*** is a bimonthly [peer-reviewed](/wiki/Peer-reviewed "Peer-reviewed") [academic journal](/wiki/Academic_journal "Academic journal") covering [social science](/wiki/Social_science "Social science") research on [protests](/wiki/Protests "Protests"), [social movements](/wiki/Social_movements "Social movements"), and [collective behavior](/wiki/Collective_behavior "Collective behavior"), including [reviews of books](/wiki/Book_review "Book review") on these topics. It was established in 2002 as a biannual journal by founding co-editors Tim Jordan, Adam Lent, and George McKay, soon to be joined by Anne Mische, and is published by [Routledge](/wiki/Routledge "Routledge"). The current [editor-in-chief](/wiki/Editor-in-chief "Editor-in-chief") is Cristina Flesher Fominaya ([Aarhus University](/wiki/Aarhus_University "Aarhus University")) . Previous editors-in-chief include and Kevin Gillan ([University of Manchester](/wiki/University_of_Manchester "University of Manchester")), Graeme Hayes ([Aston University](/wiki/Aston_University "Aston University")) and Brian Doherty ([Keele University](/wiki/Keele_University "Keele University")).

In 2017 the journal was listed by [Stefan Berger](/wiki/Stefan_Berger_(historian) "Stefan Berger (historian)") and Holger Nehrin, in their book *The History of Social Movements in Global Perspective*, as one of the "main academic journals" in the field of [social movement studies](/wiki/Social_movement_studies "Social movement studies"), alongside *[Mobilization](/wiki/Mobilization_(journal) "Mobilization (journal)")* and the open access *[Interface: A Journal for and About Social Movements](/wiki/Interface:_A_Journal_for_and_About_Social_Movements "Interface: A Journal for and About Social Movements")*.[[1]](#cite_note-BergerNehring2017-1)

## Abstracting and indexing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Social_Movement_Studies&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Abstracting and indexing")]

The journal is abstracted and indexed in [Current Contents](/wiki/Current_Contents "Current Contents")/Social & Behavioral Sciences,[[2]](#cite_note-ISI-2) [Social Sciences Citation Index](/wiki/Social_Sciences_Citation_Index "Social Sciences Citation Index"),[[2]](#cite_note-ISI-2) and [Scopus](/wiki/Scopus "Scopus").[[3]](#cite_note-Scopus-3) According to the *[Journal Citation Reports](/wiki/Journal_Citation_Reports "Journal Citation Reports")*, the journal has a 2018 [impact factor](/wiki/Impact_factor "Impact factor") of 2.0.[[4]](#cite_note-WoS-4)
